title: hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. cottianum
intro: Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. cottianum, also known as the Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium cydoniifolium subsp. cottianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
